steps.title: Use the movement context
steps.content: The Rat hears a cry and uses that sound to make his way through the dark woods to the old beech tree. The underlined word describes directing his movement by the sound.

steps.title: Choose the navigation word
steps.content: Choice A means retreating, but the Rat moves toward the sound. Choice B means displaying or offering. Choice C means teaching, which the sound is not doing. The word meaning directing one's course fits the context. The answer is D.
